plugin.name: RehearsalPlayer
plugin.title: Rehearsal Player
plugin.desc: Dark, playlist-driven rehearsal playback with tutor/class filters, artwork playlist selection, large transport controls, and quick jump presets.
plugin.changes: Removed Jazzart metadata from filters and tiles, made Tutor/Class filters mutually exclusive, and added the portrait tablet page at /jazzartplayertablet.
plugin.creator: Jazzart
